description_long: This kiosk is a modern, open-plan commercial structure with a large, flat platform base and partial vertical partitions that define its boundaries. The kiosk features several display panels, some of which are black with illuminated graphics and others that appear to be digital screens showcasing products or information. The structure is mostly white, with a prominent overhead 3D sign reading 'Tanakom Changchun' in bold letters, floating above the kiosk. The interior is open and accessible, with no visible doors or windows, and the partitions are arranged to create semi-private zones for interaction or display. The overall design is sleek and minimalist, emphasizing clean lines and functional display areas.
description: A sleek, open-plan kiosk with white partitions, digital display panels, and a floating overhead sign reading 'Tanakom Changchun'. The design is modern and minimalist, with accessible open zones and illuminated graphics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main open area, white partitions, and the prominent overhead 'Tanakom Changchun' sign.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the digital display panels and the open, accessible layout with minimal partitions.
description_view_2: Side view focusing on the arrangement of display panels and the open platform, with the sign visible in reverse.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the illuminated graphics on the black display panel and the overall open structure.
attribute_signage_type: 3D printed sign, floating above the kiosk, reading 'Tanakom Changchun'; digital display panels with illuminated graphics integrated into structure.
attribute_roof_design: Flat, open roof with no covering; features a floating 3D sign above the structure.
